news.t: State Street Investment Management Enhances Its Low-Cost State Street® SPDR® Portfolio ETF™ Suite
How to tell if it is worth avoiding taxes with a municipal bond ETF

overview.description: The State Street SPDR Portfolio Intermediate Term Treasury ETF (SPTI) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Bloomberg US Treasury (3-10 Y) index. The fund tracks a market-weighted index of US Treasurys with remaining maturities between 3-10 years. SPTI was launched on May 23, 2007 and is issued by State Street.

data.text: The best Treasury ETFs for Q2 2021 are IEI, SCHR, and SPTI.
